'''鈭歷-ch-n-d''' ('''kavachnedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bracelet|bracelet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ch-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bracelet|bracelet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-ch-n-d
|-
! Lemma
| kavachnedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivachnedoko|thivachnedoko]] || [[word:jivachnedoko|jivachnedoko]] || [[word:shivachnedoko|shivachnedoko]] || [[word:kivachnedoko|kivachnedoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
